description_long: This is a roughly cylindrical ceramic cup with a vertically ribbed texture and a speckled white glaze covering its exterior. The cup features a prominent, thick handle that is slightly irregular in shape, attached to one side. The rim of the cup is uneven and appears hand-crafted, with some dark discoloration and chipping visible along the edge. The surface is matte with a rough, tactile finish, and the glaze is not uniformly applied, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The interior is also glazed white, with some visible imperfections and dark spots. The base is flat and slightly wider than the rim, providing stability when placed on a surface.
description: A rustic, hand-crafted ceramic cup with a thick, irregular handle and a speckled white, ribbed exterior. The surface is matte and rough, with visible imperfections and a slightly uneven rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick, irregular handle and chipped rim with dark discoloration.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile of the handle and the ribbed, speckled surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous ribbed texture and the absence of the handle.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the handle attachment and the uneven rim, emphasizing the cup's hand-crafted look.
